_comment: Branch protection for GOVERNANCE tier per REPO_STANDARDS.md §2. Consumed by `install/apply-standards.sh --apply` (PR-C2) via `gh api PUT /repos/{owner}/{repo}/branches/main/protection`. Tier repos: aidoc-flow-framework, aidoc-flow-iplan-standard. Required approving reviews: 1 human (spec/schema blast radius). CODEOWNERS required. `Secret scan (gitleaks)` OMITTED from status-checks per canon §2 (governance skip).
_apply_note: PR-C2 MUST strip ALL `_`-prefix keys before POST/PUT/PATCH. Use `jq 'del(.._comment, .._apply_note, .._docs, .._endpoint, .._umbrella_note)'` or equivalent. GitHub REST endpoints strictly validate unknown fields.
